name: Bavarian Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice potatoes into 1/4-inch thick pieces.
2. Use either homemade or commercial chicken broth.
3. Boil the potatoes in the broth with salt for 5 to 8 minutes until tender. Drain them.
4. Toss the warm potatoes with vegetable oil and chopped onions.
5. Dissolve the remaining 1/4 teaspoon of salt and sugar in lemon juice.
6. Pour this mixture over the potatoes.
7. Marinate the salad for 1 to 2 hours before serving.
8. Serve at room temperature.
